pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 8 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run on JDK 21 if the compiler source/target remains set to 8, potentially causing class version mismatches or preventing the use of Java 21 features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may fail to compile code targeting Java 21 or lack support for new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of Lombok may not support the bytecode structure or annotation processing requirements of Java 21, leading to compilation errors.
